## hello world
- `touch index.html`
```html
<!doctype html>
<html>
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>home</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <h1>hello world!</h1>
  </body>
</html>
```
## gitignore
- `touch .gitignore`
```git
# metadata generated by jekyll
_site/
.jekyll-cache/
# macOS
.DS_Store
**/.DS_Store
```
## build & serve locally
- `jekyll serve`
- [http://localhost:4000](http://localhost:4000)
